title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 275.150 - Associations empowered to execute purposes of organization
text:
275.150.  Associations empowered to execute purposes of organization. — That commodity corporation associations, organized under the provisions of this chapter, shall have power and they are hereby authorized to do any and all things not specifically prohibited by law, which may be necessary to fully carry out the purposes of its organization.
(RSMo 1939 § 14382) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12724
